targets.boundary: Company-wide across global operations and value chain
targets.notes: Microsoft has stated it will be carbon negative across Scopes 1–3 by 2030 through a combination of emissions reductions and carbon removal.
targets.title: 2030 carbon negative across Scopes 1–3

targets.boundary: Company operations emissions (Scope 1 and 2) since founding
targets.notes: Microsoft has stated it will remove from the environment by 2050 all Scope 1 and 2 carbon it has emitted directly or through electricity use since 1975.
targets.title: 2050 removal of historical Scope 1 and 2 emissions since founding
